hero.title: Department of Computer Science Engineering
hero.subtitle: Innovation in AI, Data Science and Software Engineering

about.intro:
The Department of Computer Science Engineering at Bapuji Institute of Engineering & Technology focuses on cutting-edge research and industry-ready education.

Our curriculum blends core theoretical concepts with hands-on projects to prepare students for the dynamic tech landscape.

hod.name: Dr. A. Kumar
hod.message:
It is an honour to lead a team of brilliant faculty and students who push the boundaries of knowledge in computing.

We are committed to excellence in teaching, research, and outreach to empower the next generation of innovators.

placements.overview: The department has a strong placement record with top companies recruiting students every year.

spotlight.text: Awarded the prestigious Padma Shri to Prof. Kamakoti on India's 77th Republic Day Celebrations
spotlight.name: Kamakoti
